items: Type a launch time naturally when scheduling a session — `1h`, `30m`, `tomorrow 9am`, `6pm`, or an explicit date — with a live preview of exactly when it will start.
Start a scheduled session right away with the new Start now button, instead of waiting for its launch time.

Mark files as reviewed in the diff viewer: each changed file shows a Seen / Not-seen / Changed-since-seen marker you toggle with a click or the `s` key, and it remembers where you left off across restarts.
Right-click folders and files in the file tree to create a new folder or delete an item, with a confirmation step for deletes.
Switch a folder to a different branch — or create a new one — straight from the repo's right-click menu with the new "Checkout branch…" action, without starting an agent.
Export and import Canvas templates as JSON files to share your layouts between machines or with other developers.
Copy a fenced code block from a rendered markdown file with a hover Copy button.
Undo an accidental Kanban card deletion — a transient Undo button appears where the card was and restores it in place.
Snappier typing and a more responsive interface under heavy terminal output — keystrokes no longer stall when another terminal is busy or producing a flood of output.
The New Session and Schedule Session windows now open instantly and load their branch list in the background.
Order changed files in the diff viewer by when they changed (newest at the bottom) or alphabetically, and your choice is remembered.
The file tree keeps itself up to date as files are created or deleted on disk — by agents or outside the app — without a manual refresh.
Gitignored files and folders now appear dimmed in the file tree, distinct from added, edited, and deleted files.
Larger, vertically resizable card input fields in the Kanban board.
In the Kanban board, pressing Enter adds a card and keeps the composer open so you can keep typing the next one.
The five-hour usage bar turns red starting at 90% (previously 95%).
A terminal's last line no longer slips below the visible area, so the prompt always stays in view.

Scheduled worktree sessions are tidied up — the worktree and its branch are now created up front, it no longer shows up as a duplicate top-level folder when it starts, and its card header lays out cleanly.
A Canvas panel holding a scheduled agent now shows the live terminal once the schedule fires — and stays correct when popped out into its own window — instead of reading "no longer pending".
Fixed the Template Editor's block-config layout (compact path-mode buttons and a taller prompt field).
The Canvas tabs "+" button now matches the visual size of its neighbors.
Copy buttons (markdown code blocks and the like) now work reliably on both macOS and Windows.
